evidence: The instrumented runtime shows logical_used_64=2147483679 while truncated_used_32=-2147483617 inside _upb_DescState_Grow(). The function then reports expected_realloc=true and skipped_realloc=true with bufsize_after=64, proving the realloc check was bypassed due to truncation. A follow-on encoder write crashes under ASan in upb_MtDataEncoder_PutRaw.
